semantic.role: Vitest test suite for LLM provider utility functions (parseMarkdownBlocks, parseStructuredResponse, and related helpers).
responsibilities: Validates parseMarkdownBlocks correctly splits locale-tagged markdown blocks into a key-value object.
Validates parseStructuredResponse correctly separates the JSON portion from the markdown portion, handling code fences and extra delimiters.
Provides regression coverage for edge cases such as markdown blocks without newlines or with multiple JSON objects.
outOfScope: Not a production module; does not export any runtime functionality.
Does not cover integration tests or end-to-end LLM provider behavior.
invariants: Tests must pass under vitest and must not rely on external services.
Utility functions behave purely synchronously with string inputs and structured outputs.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure correctness and stability of LLM provider utility functions through isolated unit tests.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit — add test suite for LLM provider utils.
